data.body:
Add support for installing, uninstalling, and updating Knots-managed skills for Codex, Claude, and OpenCode. Prefer project-level skill injection when the target tool supports it; otherwise fall back to user-level installation. If a required skill is not detected during install or update flows, prompt the user to install it. Extend Doctor
lock_health:  ✓ repo/cache locks are acquirable
   worktree:  ✓ knots worktree is clean
     remote:  ✓ origin reachable; knots branch exists
    version:  ✓ v0.7.6 is up to date
      hooks:  ⚠ missing sync hooks: post-merge (run `kno doctor --fix`) to verify that the expected skills are configured for the user and report missing setup clearly.
data.title: add kno skills install/uninstall
